/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -flto -pthread -g CMakeFiles/sentinel_core.dir/src/firestore_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_core.dir/src/graph_sniper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_core.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_core.dir/src/sieve_xgboost.cpp.o -o sentinel_core  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/local/lib/libxgboost.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
